rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the `True` placeholder fields in `ReductiveGroup` and `SemisimpleGroup` (visible at lines 63 and 68 of the diff) will cause breaking changes for instance constructors when replaced in follow-up PRs; marking them experimental addresses this forward-compatibility/deprecation risk. Review 2's narrow reading (no existing API deprecated) misses this real, actionable concern.
